## Checklist (see CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] No secrets, no real client data, no em dashes
- [ ] If generator output changed intentionally: goldens regenerated and the diff is described below
- [ ] If module structure or flows changed: `docs/wiki/` regenerated (`npm run docs:wiki`)
- [ ] Hand-written docs (`docs/architecture.md`, `docs/runbook.md`, README) updated if behavior they describe changed
